ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract ends */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "referee_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of referee IDs who officiated the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics are for */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls committed */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of technical fouls committed */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles achieved */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "previous_team" TEXT /* Previous team the coach coached */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* JSON object containing the coach's record */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the coach */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any coaching certifications or awards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most valuable player of the season */,
  "all_star_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the all-star game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for team statistics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team made it to the playoffs */,
  "playoff_rounds_won" INTEGER /* Number of playoff rounds won */,
  "highest_scoring_game" INTEGER /* Points scored in the highest-scoring game */,
  "lowest_scoring_game" INTEGER /* Points scored in the lowest-scoring game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_statistics" (
  "playoff_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for playoff statistics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of playoff games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of playoff games won */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of playoff games lost */,
  "playoff_win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_highest_scoring_game" INTEGER /* Points scored in the highest-scoring playoff game */,
  "playoff_lowest_scoring_game" INTEGER /* Points scored in the lowest-scoring playoff game */,
  "playoff_rounds_won" INTEGER /* Number of playoff rounds won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the referee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the referee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the referee was hired */,
  "games_officiated" INTEGER /* Total number of games officiated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the referee */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications or awards */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams the referee has officiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officiating" (
  "officiating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officiating record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game officiated */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  "assistant_referee_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of assistant referee IDs */,
  "officiating_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the officiating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officiating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officiating_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officiating_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, coach, analyst, etc.) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
